element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary weapon throughout; upgraded/exchanged for variants
Collected throughout levels, retained between stages but lost on death
Scale with weapon upgrades; behavior differs by mech form (fixed formation) vs jet form (snake pattern)
Fast horizontal movement, forward-only intense fire, helper ships in snake pattern
Wider shooting angle including backwards fire with upgrades, faster vertical speed, fixed helper formation, homing missiles
Sustains 3 hits; critical survival mechanic since ship dies in one unshielded hit
Five large forward blasts; limited uses in Stock mode, rechargeable but weaker in Charge mode
Temporary invulnerability with flame aura; limited in Stock mode, rechargeable in Charge mode
One stage breaks horizontal scrolling convention; requires vertical navigation mastery

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based tension with punctuated relief through power collection and ability usage; form-switching allows tactical rhythm adjustment

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic shot and early power-ups; learning form switching mechanics with helper ships
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Weapon variant mastery and form optimization; Arrow Flash ability introduction; increased enemy density
difficulty_curve.late_game: Full mechanical arsenal deployed; single vertically scrolling stage breaks horizontal convention requiring spatial reorientation
notable_spikes: Introduction of vertical scrolling stage requiring different navigational skills
Boss encounters likely demand form-switching strategy
Missile behavior differences between forms create tactical complexity

notable_level_patterns.description: Primary level design paradigm with left-to-right progression; jet form emphasizes forward velocity, mech form emphasizes vertical evasion
Single stage deviates from horizontal scrolling, presenting unique spatial challenge and requiring vertical navigation mastery
Weapon and shield pickups distributed throughout levels as tension-relief mechanisms; lost entirely on player death creating consequence loops
